mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id as memberId, game_id as gameId, return_rate as returnRate, game_rank as gameRank, earned_score as earnedScore, post_score as postScore, earned_cash as earnedCash, post_cash as postCash, entered_at as enteredAt FROM game_participations WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER by entered_at DESC

SELECT id, member_id as memberId, game_id as gameId, return_rate as returnRate, game_rank as gameRank, earned_score as earnedScore, post_score as postScore, earned_cash as earnedCash, post_cash as postCash, entered_at as enteredAt FROM game_participations WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER by entered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
